description: Minimal non-PBC linear demo workflow used to certify that the generic wrkf runtime drives an arbitrary workflow (attach, inspect, evidence, obligation, transition, effect) without any pack-specific knowledge.

agent.description: Records the demo note, runs the transition, and satisfies the review obligation.

system.description: System effect adapter and administrative workflow authority.

states.description: Initial state: the agent has not yet submitted the demo note.
The demo note was submitted; a blocking review obligation is open.
Terminal state: the demo workflow is complete.

demo_note.description: A free-form note recorded by the agent to drive the single transition.

demo_review.description: A blocking review obligation opened by the submit transition.

transitions.description: Submit the demo note, open a review obligation, and project the task to blocked.

outcomes.description: Note submitted; move to the review state, open the review obligation, and emit a task-state effect.

effects.reason: demo-linear submit projects task state to blocked
